mapper.insert: INSERT INTO device_tokens (user_id, token, platform) VALUES (#{userId}, #{token}, #{platform}) ON CONFLICT (token) DO UPDATE SET user_id = EXCLUDED.user_id, platform = EXCLUDED.platform, updated_at = NOW()
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM device_tokens WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND token = #{token}
mapper.select: SELECT token FROM device_tokens WHERE user_id = #{userId}
